signals.headline: **Solana Alpenglow upgrade**: Passed governance vote (98
signals.raw: **Solana Alpenglow upgrade**: Passed governance vote (98.27% in favor) to cut transaction finality to 100-150ms; network hit 167M monthly holders and record fees >$500K/day; ETF assets >$1B. Could boost sentiment but not new today (MED confidence).[3][4][5]

signals.headline: What I can tell you from available results:**
signals.raw:
What I can tell you from available results:**

As of **December 2025**, Powell announced the Fed's third consecutive quarter-point rate cut and characterized the economy as "very unusual," with tariff-driven goods inflation peaking around Q1 2026[1][4]. He emphasized that most inflation overshoot stems from Trump's tariffs rather than domestic overheating, and projected 2.3% GDP growth for 2026[4]

signals.raw:
Raptors Clinch Eastern Conference 5th Seed Playoff Spot After Magic's Final-Game Loss to Celtics | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Toronto Raptors secured the No. 5 seed in the Eastern Conference playoffs due to the Orlando Magic's loss to the Boston Celtics in the regular season finale, with Boston resting starters; this pits the Raptors against the Cavaliers in the first round.[2]
